name: Paubox
description: HIPAA-compliant email API and transactional email service that encrypts outbound email by default for healthcare apps.

seo.title: Paubox — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Paubox: HIPAA-compliant email API and transactional email service that encrypts outbound email by default for healthcare apps.

when_to_use: HIPAA-compliant transactional email for healthcare apps
Default-encrypted email API for patient communication
Secure email API replacing standard SMTP in health apps
PHI-safe email delivery for telehealth platforms
Compliance-first email for insurance and dental SaaS

pros: HIPAA-compliant email by default, not an add-on
Drop-in SMTP/API replaces SendGrid for healthcare
Good focus on encryption and audit trails
cons: Pricier than generic transactional email providers
Deliverability tooling less deep than Postmark
review.verdict: If you ship healthcare software in the US, Paubox saves the HIPAA email headache — elsewhere it is overkill.
review.best_for: US healthtech apps needing HIPAA-compliant transactional and team email
review.not_for: Non-healthcare products or teams already comfortable with SendGrid plus BAAs
